buildCommand: REPO=$(dirname $(pnpm root -w)) && pnpm --filter @workspace/panthers-bite run build && mkdir -p /vercel/output/static && cp -r $REPO/artifacts/panthers-bite/dist/. /vercel/output/static/ && printf '{"version":3,"routes":[{"handle":"filesystem"},{"src":"/(.*)" ,"dest":"/index.html"}]}' > /vercel/output/config.json
